case_title: ERNESTO A. BENEDITO VS. SUSAN LEE LINDEMAN

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING IN FRONT OF JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL FILED BY BENEDITO, ERNESTO A.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY SUSAN LEE LINDEMAN IS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEDITO, ERNESTO A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINDEMAN, SUSAN LEE $602.71 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $662.71, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $927.24 AND ATTRIBUTES 65% COMPARITIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
2ND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT RECEIVED AND FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEDITO, ERNESTO A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINDEMAN, SUSAN LEE $927.24 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $987.24 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BENEDITO, ERNESTO A. ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LINDEMAN, SUSAN LEE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $996.00 FILED BY BENEDITO, ERNESTO A. AS TO DEFENDANT LINDEMAN, SUSAN LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
